visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young man with messy brown hair and a white sweatshirt featuring large black and yellow sunflower designs stands in a modern room. He speaks with high energy, gesturing with his hands. A person in a blue hoodie wearing a large-toothed mask stands behind him. (2) The scene shifts to a large walk-in shoe closet. The man holds up a pair of tan furry slippers and then a green pair, comparing them. He points to the full shelves behind him and tosses several pairs into a white laundry bag on the floor. (3) The man moves to a wooden cabinet. He pulls out armfuls of clear plastic bubble wrap and green padding material. He appears visibly agitated, throwing the waste into the white bag. Masked figures in the background watch and provide reactions. (4) In a tighter shot, the man holds a black smartphone case and various small electronic accessories. He demonstrates a rule about getting rid of old items. He tosses the items into the bag with a dramatic flare. (5) The man opens a double-door refrigerator. He pulls out a large brown bottle and a white milk carton, checking the expiration dates with a shocked expression. He discovers an old bottle of sauce, leading to a comedic outburst.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 嘎哥要來教大家. [Variety]: 斷捨離奧義. (2) [Slogan]: 觀念一 鞋櫃一進一出. [Variety]: 同款不同色. [Variety]: (相似舊款直接丟). (3) [Slogan]: NT 6,000. [Slogan]: 觀念二 越貴要越常穿. [Slogan]: 平均成本才能下降. (4) [Slogan]: 觀念三 盒子不要留. (5) [Slogan]: 觀念四 買新汰舊. [Variety]: 全部都要丟掉. (6) [Subtitle]: 保存期限 2024年11月26號. [Variety]: 生無可戀. (7) [Subtitle]: 2023年 水餃醬汁.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 female participant, 2 people in masks appearing intermittently.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young male with brown hair wearing a white oversized sweatshirt with large sunflower graphics on the chest and sleeves and blue jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern apartment interior featuring a dark wood door, a large walk-in shoe closet with multiple rows of sneakers, a tall wooden storage cabinet, and a kitchen area with a stainless steel refrigerator.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, high-arousal male voice speaks rapidly in Mandarin, setting a comedic tone. A bright, upbeat electronic pop track with a steady 120 BPM beat serves as the background music. Faint background laughter and room tone are audible. (2) Distinct thud and clatter sounds occur as shoes are handled. The speaker's intensity swells into a shout as he announces a rule. A whoosh sound effect transition is used frequently to punctuate the energetic delivery. (3) The acoustic texture changes with the loud rustling of plastic bubble wrap and the sound of items hitting a bag. A sharp, melodic ding sound effect plays to emphasize a point. The speaker's pitch variability is extremely high. (4) The speaker's voice becomes more aggressive and strained for comedic effect. There is a sudden percussive hit sound effect. The background music continues with a strong, driving beat that synchronizes with the fast-paced vocal delivery. (5) The BGM briefly ducks or stops for a moment of dramatic silence as the speaker inspects a label. A loud pop SFX occurs, followed by the sound of a refrigerator door opening. The sequence ends with a high-energy vocal climax.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Rule 1 -> Rule 2 -> Rule 3 -> Rule 4 -> Discovery/Climax -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: A comedic instructional video where a creator teaches decluttering (Danshari) rules while aggressively discarding his wife's belongings, creating humor through the contrast of logical rules and exaggeratedly ruthless behavior.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No specific product is being promoted; the video focuses on a comedic concept.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high editing density and variety-show style text overlays to maintain a fast comedic pace. The use of masked characters adds to the surreal humor.
